error.capacity_details: %d bits barbaadu, dandeettiin guddaan k=1 irratti %d bits dha
error.empty_coefficients: coefficient slice duwwaa ta'uu hin danda'u
error.empty_password: jecha icciitii duwwaa ta'uu hin danda'u
error.insufficient_capacity: ergaan dandeettii koofiishinii jiruuf baay’ee guddaadha
error.insufficient_coefficients: yeroo ukkaamsuu koofiishinoota gahaa hin taane: %d barbaachisa, %d argate
error.insufficient_header_coefficients: koofiishinoota fayyadamaa gahaa hin taane mataduree keessa galchuuf: bittii 32 barbaachisa, koofiishinoota fayyadamaa %d qofa argame

error.invalid_coefficient_range: gatii koofiishinii daangaa sirrii ta’een ala (-2048 hanga 2047) .
error.invalid_force_k: sirrii hin taane ForceK: 0 (auto) ykn 1-8 ta'uu qaba
error.invalid_k_parameter: k paaraameetirii 1 fi 8 gidduutti ta’uu qaba
error.matrix_encode_failed: koodii maatriksii jecha koodii: %v tiif hin milkoofne
error.message_too_large: guddinni ergaa guddaa hayyamame (8,388,607 baayitii) caala .
